arts.ttl: Vinicius Jr sets Kylian Mbappe demand amid Real Madrid exit talk
arts.sum: That is according to Spanish outlet Diario AS, who report that Vinicius currently earns a salary of €15m-per-year, with the Brazil star demanding an additional €5m per annum in order to snub Saudi Arabia and extend his Real Madrid contract. Vinicius Junior will reportedly only sign a contract extension at Real Madrid if he usurps Kylian Mbappe as the club’s highest earner.

arts.sum: Los Blancos made a significant move for Alexander-Arnold when they tabled a £20million offer for him in January, just six months before his contract is set to expire.

arts.sum: The left-back has fast become one of the most sought-after teenagers in world football, with a handful of European giants earmarking him as a potential star for the future.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid calculate how much it will cost to renew Vinicius' contract this summer
arts.sum: Following reports of Vin’cius’ desire to secure a renewal this summer (his current contract runs until 2027) Real Madrid has initiated discussions with the player’s representatives . Mbappé and Vinicius are currently earning the same salary at Real Madrid, with both taking home €15 million net per season.
